chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-241 of 2023. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.884/2023, 2. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 3. For hearing of main case. 18.04.2023 Petitioner in person. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant petition are that the petitioner filed a Suit for Recovery of Damages of Rupees Three Lacs against the respondents for killing his dogs; the plaint whereof was rejected by learned 1st Civil Judge, Shikarpur, vide order dated 11.03.2023, which is impugned by him before this Court by way of instant petition, which apparently is incompetent, as order of rejection of the plaint by a Civil Court is to be impugned in appeal before the District Court having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
